name: Pineapple Bundt Cake Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Oil and flour a bundt pan.
3. In a medium-size bowl, sift together all-purpose flour, cream of tartar, baking soda, and salt. Stir in whole wheat flour and wheat germ. Set aside.
4. In a small bowl, whisk egg replacer and water until foamy. Set aside.
5. In a large bowl, mix applesauce and brown sugar. Stir in corn syrup, juice concentrate, almond extract, and egg replacer.
6. Add tofu to the food processor and blend while gradually adding lemon juice through the feed tube.
7. Fold the dry ingredients into the applesauce mixture alternately with the tofu mixture. Gently stir in almonds and crushed pineapple.
8. Pour batter into the prepared pan and bake until light brown and the cake springs back when touched lightly, about 45 minutes.
9. Turn out onto a wire rack and let cool for 30 minutes before slicing and serving.
